FactionEfficiencyPage.title: Faction Reward Efficiency - Albion Online
FactionEfficiencyPage.description: Calculate the most profitable items to buy with your Faction Points. Compare hearts, crests, and mounts across all royal cities.

HeartTransportPage.title: Heart Transport Profitability - Albion Online
HeartTransportPage.description: Calculate net profits for city-to-city heart transports. Account for market taxes and transport fees.

BanditTrackerPage.title: Bandit Assault Tracker - Albion Online
BanditTrackerPage.description: Live countdown and notification system for the next Bandit Assault event in the Outlands.

CampaignTrackerPage.title: Campaign Progress Tracker - Albion Online
CampaignTrackerPage.description: Track your monthly faction campaign progress and see how many points you need to reach your goal.

efficiency.whatIsDesc: Faction Efficiency determines how many actual Faction Points you receive per activity. It scales based on your Faction Standing, Premium status, and the risk level of the zone you are in (Red Zones yield the highest multipliers).
efficiency.howWorksDesc: Select your Faction, Standing level, and Premium status. The calculator will automatically pull the live daily zone modifiers and multiply them to show you exactly how many points you'll earn per 100 base points in any activity.
efficiency.title: Faction Reward Efficiency
efficiency.subtitle: Maximize your Silver per Point

transport.whatIsDesc: Heart Transports are high-risk, high-reward smuggling missions where you carry your faction's Hearts to an enemy city. The longer the route, the higher the payout.
transport.howWorksDesc: The matrix displays the profit margins for transporting hearts between different cities. It factors in the distance multiplier and current market prices. Select your origin city to see the most profitable destination routes.
transport.title: Heart Transport Profitability
transport.subtitle: City-to-City Trade Matrix
transport.quantityTooltip: The number of hearts you plan to transport. Affects total profit display.
transport.matrixNote: The matrix shows the Best ROI Heart for each route. Hover over any cell to see specific prices and which heart is currently the most profitable for that trip.
transport.calcNote: Profit is calculated using Sell Price Min at Source and Buy Order Max at Destination, after 6.5% total fees.

bandit.title: Bandit Assault Tracker
bandit.subtitle: Next Event Countdown
bandit.timezoneNote: All times are in UTC (Game Time).
bandit.imminentBody: Next roll window for {region} starts in {mins} minutes ({chance}% chance).
bandit.proTipDesc: Bandit Assault triggers within a 1-hour roll window. Each window has a specific probability based on historical game data. Using the Outlands portals during the start of the window is recommended for solo transport safety.
bandit.whatIsDesc1: Bandit Assault is a major Faction Warfare event in the Red Zones of the Royal Continent. During the event, Caerleon takes control of all outposts, and factions must fight to capture them back.
bandit.whatIsDesc2: This event is highly profitable for Faction Points and is also a strategic window for heart transports.
bandit.howWorksDesc: We use historical data to estimate when the next window might open. While we cannot guarantee exact times, our model provides the highest probability windows to help you plan your gameplay.
bandit.triggerProbDesc: Albion Online uses a rolling system for Bandit Assaults. Every few hours, there's a "roll" to see if an assault starts. Our tracker uses community-sourced probability percentages to show you when an event is most likely to begin.

campaign.title: Campaign Progress Tracker
campaign.subtitle: Monthly Point Projections
campaign.goalReachedDesc: You have successfully reached your faction campaign goal for this month.
campaign.calculationNote: Calculations are based on {days} days remaining in the current calendar month (UTC).
campaign.whatIsDesc: The Faction Campaign is a monthly progression system in Albion Online. By participating in Faction Warfare, you earn points that unlock valuable tier chests containing tomes, silver, and faction hearts.
campaign.proTipDesc: To maximize your rewards, aim for at least Tier 6 every month. Use the Daily Goal metric above to ensure you are pacing correctly. Participating in Bandit Assaults is the fastest way to stay ahead of pace.

Common.underConstructionDesc: We're currently building this {tool} tool. Check back later for updates!

Footer.description: The ultimate Albion Online companion tool for market trading, PvP tracking, and build sharing.
Footer.notAffiliated: Not affiliated with Sandbox Interactive Ltd. Albion Online is a trademark of Sandbox Interactive Ltd.

HomePage.heroSubtitle: Plan your next move in Albion Online with live market data, PvP insights, and meta builds — all in one place so you can spend less time tabbing out and more time playing Albion Online.
HomePage.marketDescription: Identify profitable trade routes between cities. Compare buy and sell orders with automatic tax calculations to maximize your margins.
HomePage.pvpDescription: Monitor server-wide PvP kills as they happen. Track active players and popular equipment in real-time.
HomePage.zvzDescription: Analyze large-scale battles with detailed metrics on guild performance, attendance, and gear composition.
HomePage.safeDescription: We use the Albion Data Project to gather public market data. Our tools are strictly read-only and do not interact with the game client in any bannable way.
HomePage.safeToUseDesc: No injection, no memory reading, no automation. We rely on community-gathered data.
HomePage.dataProjectDesc: Powered by the largest decentralized data network in Albion. Contribute to help others!
HomePage.privacyFirstDesc: We don't track your personal game activity or link your character unless you choose to.
HomePage.pvpIntelDesc: Instantly analyze enemy players, check their IP and win rates before you engage.
HomePage.craftingCalcDesc: Optimize your focus usage. Calculate profit margins for refining and crafting.
HomePage.farmingProfitsDesc: Calculate the most profitable crops and animals to raise on your island.
HomePage.stayUpdatedDesc: Follow us on Twitter or subscribe to our newsletter for the latest meta updates and market insights.

faq.a1: Yes! AlbionKit is 100% free and open source under the MIT License. All features are available to everyone at no cost. We accept voluntary donations to help cover server costs and development time, but nothing is locked behind a paywall.
faq.q2: Is it safe? Will I get banned?
faq.a2: AlbionKit is completely safe. We do not inspect game memory, inject code, or automate actions. We strictly follow SBI's Terms of Service. All market data is crowdsourced via the approved Albion Data Project.
faq.q3: How accurate is the market data?
faq.a3: Prices are updated by real players using the Albion Data Client. In major cities like Lymhurst and Fort Sterling, data is typically just minutes old. Less popular items may have older data.
faq.q4: Can I contribute to the project?
faq.a4: Absolutely! AlbionKit is open source and welcomes contributions. You can help with translations, report bugs, suggest features, or even submit code. Check out our GitHub repository to get started.
faq.q5: Do you have a mobile app?
faq.a5: AlbionKit is a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can install it directly on your phone or tablet for a native-like experience without needing an app store.

HomePage.goldPriceDesc: Track gold prices across all servers
HomePage.buildsDesc: Discover meta builds from top players

AboutPage.title: About AlbionKit - Our Mission & Team
AboutPage.description: Learn about AlbionKit, our mission to provide free Albion Online tools, and the team behind the project.
AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Our mission is to provide the Albion Online community with the most powerful, accurate, and easy-to-use tools completely free of charge.
AboutPage.missionP1: AlbionKit started as a simple passion project by a single player who was tired of relying on outdated spreadsheets and clunky Discord bots.
AboutPage.missionP2: Today, it has evolved into a comprehensive suite of tools designed to help players of all skill levels navigate the complex economy and dangerous PvP zones of Albion Online.
AboutPage.missionP3: We believe in an open-source ethos. No premium tiers, no paywalls, just pure utility powered by the incredible Albion Data Project.
AboutPage.marketFlipperDesc: Instantly find profitable trade routes between the Royal Cities and the Black Market. Factor in fast travel, taxes, and daily volume to guarantee silver profits.
AboutPage.pvpIntelDesc: Analyze the live Killboard to see what meta weapons are dominating the Outlands. Scout enemy players and guilds before you engage.
AboutPage.killFeedDesc: Monitor real-time PvP combat across all servers. See exactly who is dying, where, and what gear they dropped.
AboutPage.craftingCalcDesc: Whether you are a chef, an alchemist, a farmer, or a laborer, our tools calculate exact margins based on real-time prices so you never craft at a loss.
AboutPage.metaBuildsDesc: Discover the most popular loadouts used by top players in Corrupted Dungeons, Hellgates, and ZvZ battles.
AboutPage.guildManagementDesc: Track Bandit Assaults, calculate faction point efficiency, and maximize your returns on heart transports.
AboutPage.globalSupportDesc: Fully localized in 9 languages, ensuring the global Albion community can trade and fight without language barriers.
AboutPage.dataSourcesDesc: We rely heavily on the Albion Data Project. If you find our tools useful, please consider installing the client to help keep prices updated for everyone!

about.title: About the Killboard
about.description: The AlbionKit Killboard provides real-time tracking of PvP events across all Albion Online servers (West, East, Europe). Data is sourced directly from the game's event API, allowing you to monitor battles as they happen, analyze guild and alliance performance, track high-value kills, and review detailed combat statistics. Perfect for PvP players, guild leaders, and anyone wanting to stay informed about Albion's dynamic battlefield.
about.noteDesc: There is typically a slight delay (seconds to minutes) between the actual in-game event and its appearance on the feed due to API processing times.

metrics.title: Understanding Metrics
metrics.killFameDesc: Total estimated market value of items equipped by the victim at the time of death. Higher fame means more expensive gear destroyed.
metrics.ipDesc: A weighted average measuring the strength of a player's equipment and mastery levels.
metrics.proTipDesc: Click on any kill event to see a detailed breakdown of the equipment, participants, and damage dealers involved in the fight.

KillFeed.historicalDataEstimated: * Historical data is estimated based on sampled events and battle reports.

Metadata.title: AlbionKit - The Ultimate Albion Online Companion
Metadata.description: Master Albion Online with AlbionKit - the ultimate companion for serious players. Access powerful tools including Market Flipper for profitable trades, Faction Warfare tools (Campaign, Transport & Efficiency), Bandit Assault Tracker, PvP Intel with live kill feeds, Crafting Calculator with focus optimization, Farming Profit trackers, and ZvZ Battle analytics. Join thousands of players who trust AlbionKit for real-time market data, build guides, and competitive advantages across all Albion Online servers.
Metadata.keywords: Albion Online, Albion Builds, Market Flipper, PvP Intel, Crafting Calculator, Faction Warfare, Bandit Tracker, Albion Tools, Albion Database, MMORPG

home.title: AlbionKit - Market Tools, Faction Trackers, PvP Intel & Meta Builds
home.description: Elevate your Albion Online experience with AlbionKit's powerful suite of tools. Access real-time market data for profitable trading, track Faction Campaigns and Bandit Assaults, monitor PvP kills with live feeds, discover meta builds from top players, calculate crafting profits, and optimize your farming. Trusted by thousands of Albion players worldwide.

howItWorks.title: How Guild Licenses Work
howItWorks.subtitle: Everything you need to know about your Guild Master benefits
howItWorks.f1Desc: Every single member of your guild automatically receives Adept status. They get unlimited watchlists, advanced analytics, and ad-free browsing just by being in your guild.
howItWorks.f2Desc: Enable "Alliance Access" to extend these benefits to every guild in your alliance. This is perfect for large coalitions looking to standardize their market tools.
howItWorks.f3Desc: Changing guilds? You can transfer your license to a new guild at any time using the "Change" button in the Guild ID section above.
howItWorks.f4Desc: Track your guild's engagement with real-time stats on member activity, tool usage, and market operations directly from this dashboard.

transferDialog.title: Confirm License Transfer
transferDialog.desc: Are you sure you want to transfer your Guild Master license from "{oldGuild}" to "{newGuild}"? This action cannot be undone.

GuildLicense.memberCountsDesc: The "Alliance Population" ({count}) represents the total combined members of all guilds listed above, as reported by the Albion Online API.

CookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicy.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. This policy explains what cookies are and how we use them.

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small pieces of text sent by your web browser by a website you visit. A cookie file is stored in your web browser and allows the Service or a third-party to recognize you and make your next visit easier and the Service more useful to you. Cookies can be "persistent" or "session" cookies.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
howWeUse.intro: When you use and access the Service, we may place a number of cookies files in your web browser. We use cookies for the following purposes:

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. You cannot disable these.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: We use these to understand how visitors interact with our website, helping us improve the user experience. These collect information anonymously.

functionality.title: Functionality Cookies
functionality.description: These allow us to remember choices you make (such as your preferred server region or language) to provide a more personalized experience.

choices.title: 3. Your Choices
choices.content: If you'd like to delete cookies or instruct your web browser to delete or refuse cookies, please visit the help pages of your web browser. Please note, however, that if you delete cookies or refuse to accept them, you might not be able to use all of the features we offer, you may not be able to store your preferences, and some of our pages might not display properly.

RefundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
RefundPolicy.description: We aim to be fair and transparent. Please read our policy regarding refunds for subscriptions and donations.

general.title: 1. General Policy
general.content: AlbionKit provides immediate access to premium digital features and tools (such as Adept and Guild Master tiers). Due to the nature of digital content where access is granted instantly, all sales are generally considered final and non-refundable once the service has been accessed or used.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time via the Settings page. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period, but you will not be charged again.

refundEligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
refundEligibility.content: Refunds are typically only issued in cases of technical error (e.g., double billing) or if required by local law.

exceptions.title: 3. Exceptions & Disputes
exceptions.content: We understand that mistakes happen. If you believe a transaction was made in error (e.g., duplicate charge) or you have extenuating circumstances, please contact us within 7 days of the transaction.
exceptions.item1: Accidental double charges will be refunded immediately upon verification.
exceptions.item2: Forgotten cancellations may be considered for a refund if the service was not used during the renewal period (subject to review).

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about our Refund Policy or need to request a refund, please reach out to us through any of the following channels:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Please read these terms carefully before using AlbionKit. They outline your rights, responsibilities, and our legal obligations.

agreement.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreement.content: By accessing or using AlbionKit, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you disagree with any part of the terms, then you may not access the service. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service.

ip.title: 2. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Service and its original content (excluding user-generated content), features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of AlbionKit and its licensors.
ip.albionIpContent: Albion Online and the Albion Online logo are trademarks of Sandbox Interactive GmbH. AlbionKit is a community-created tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Sandbox Interactive GmbH. All game assets used are property of their respective owners.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: When you create an account with us, you must provide us information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account on our Service.
accounts.securityContent: You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the Service.
accounts.useContent: You may not use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.

termination.title: 4. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using the Service.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall AlbionKit, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: We are committed to protecting your personal data and ensuring your experience with AlbionKit is safe and secure.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to AlbionKit ("we," "our," or "us"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website (regardless of where you visit it from) and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

data.title: 2. Data We Collect
data.content: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:
data.identityContent: Includes username, email address, and any profile information you choose to provide (such as in-game character names).
data.technicalContent: Internet protocol (IP) address, login data, browser type and version, time zone setting, and operating system.
data.usageContent: Information about how you use our website, products, and services, including tool usage patterns.
data.transactionContent: Details about payments to and from you and other details of products you have purchased from us (processed securely via Lemon Squeezy).

use.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
use.content: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:
use.c1: Where we need to perform the contract we are about to enter into or have entered into with you (e.g., providing premium features).
use.c2: Where it is necessary for our legitimate interests (or those of a third party) and your interests and fundamental rights do not override those interests.
use.c3: Where we need to comply with a legal or regulatory obligation.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Links & Services
thirdParty.content: This website may include links to third-party websites, plug-ins, and applications. Clicking on those links or enabling those connections may allow third parties to collect or share data about you. We do not control these third-party websites and are not responsible for their privacy statements.
thirdParty.firebase: Google Firebase: Used for authentication and database services.
thirdParty.lemonsqueezy: Lemon Squeezy: Used as our Merchant of Record for payments and subscriptions.
thirdParty.adp: Albion Data Project: We consume public market data but do not send your personal data to them.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: AlbionKit uses cookies to improve your browsing experience and provide personalized services.

what.title: 1. What are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the owners of the site.

how.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
how.content: We use cookies for several reasons, including:
how.essentialContent: Necessary for the website to function, such as authentication and security.
how.preferencesContent: Remember your settings like language, theme, and region.
how.analyticsContent: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

control.title: 3. Controlling Cookies
control.content: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies that are already on your computer and you can set most browsers to prevent them from being placed.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.description: Our policy regarding refunds for premium subscriptions and digital services.

general.title: 1. General Policy
general.content: AlbionKit provides immediate access to premium digital features and tools (such as Adept and Guild Master tiers). Due to the nature of digital content where access is granted instantly, all sales are generally considered final and non-refundable once the service has been accessed or used.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time via the Settings page. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period, but you will not be charged again.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.content: Refunds are typically only issued in cases of technical error (e.g., double billing) or if required by local law.

exceptions.title: 3. Exceptions & Disputes
exceptions.content: We understand that mistakes happen. If you believe a transaction was made in error (e.g., duplicate charge) or you have extenuating circumstances, please contact us within 7 days of the transaction.

list.item1: Accidental double charges will be refunded immediately upon verification.
list.item2: Forgotten cancellations may be considered for a refund if the service was not used during the renewal period (subject to review).

trial.title: Free Trials
trial.content: We offer a 7-day free trial for new monthly subscribers. You can cancel at any time during the trial period to avoid being charged. Once the trial ends and the first payment is processed, no refunds will be issued for that period.

tips: No risk of losing resources on death

tips: No risk of losing resources on death
Use focus points for maximum efficiency

spiders.name: Crystal Spiders
